nasb.text: Then the lords of the Philistines brought up to her seven fresh cords that had not been dried, and she bound him with them.

esv.text: Then the lords of the Philistines brought up to her seven fresh bowstrings that had not been dried, and she bound him with them.

cnv.text: 於是非利士人的領袖把七條未乾的青繩子，帶上來給那婦人，她就用那些繩子把參孫捆綁起來。

ccb.text: 非利士人的首领便把七根还没干的青绳子交给大利拉，她用那些绳子把参孙绑起来。
